_meta.purpose: AUTO-DRAFT candidates for SME review — NOT the scorer oracle yet. Grounded in DECISIONS D15-D22 and postcoordination-literature-review.md §6.

how_to_read.constituents: Scorable (axis, filler) pairs — the curated projection (allowlist R88/R101/R105 + op: axes). Compatible with score.py.
how_to_read.needs_review: Ambiguous ties the extractor refused to resolve; score.py excludes these (D21). SME must resolve.
how_to_read.review_buckets: Full labelled breakdown by curation scope; the SME works here.
how_to_read.review_flags: Per-concept prose prompts for the SME.

known_extractor_gaps: op:StageSystem is NOT implemented: R88 conflates the stage VALUE (e.g. 'Stage III') and the staging SYSTEM (e.g. 'AJCC v7 Stage') on one role (lit-review §6 role overload). System fillers are surfaced under review_buckets.stage_system_split with a proposed_axis, for an SME/design decision — not auto-split into the scorable set.
Morphology is resolved from the first non-staging genus parent; the prior golden marked it TBD. Confirm the filler is the intended morphology.

op:AssociatedLineageClassification now fires (walker anchoring_genus fix); verify lineage fillers (e.g. Endocrine Gland/System from C3010/C3809/C3773) are the intended co-equal lineage senses (D20 refinement 1).
R101/R105 residual multi-filler ties are surfaced as needs_review, not forced to one value (D16/D21 fail-safe direction).

validation.note: 'extra' op:Morphology/C3879 is the correct morphology the prior golden left TBD (draft is more complete here). 'missing' op:AssociatedLineageClassification/C12705 (Endocrine System) is a genuine walker recall gap.
